title: Tunisian Tagine with Grape Juice
description: A sweet and savory Tunisian-inspired stew made with rich flavors and grape juice.
instructions: Heat oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 8 minutes.
Add chicken and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add grape juice, spice blend, and water to the tagine. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover the tagine and cook, stirring occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened, about 25 minutes.
Stir in honey and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with cilantro and serve over couscous or rice.
Serve with a drizzle of honey and a side of warm pita bread, if desired.
